gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF (LVEF<=40%) without evidence-based BB (carvedilol, metoprolol succinate, bisoprolol)
gaps.name: HFrEF: Beta-blocker not prescribed
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx (I50.2x/I50.4x), LVEF, active med RxNorm

gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF on atenolol, metoprolol tartrate, or nebivolol
gaps.name: HFrEF: Non-evidence-based beta-blocker
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, BB identity by RxNorm

gaps.detectionLogic: On evidence-based BB but below target with HR>=60 SBP>=100
gaps.name: HFrEF: BB not at target dose

gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF without sacubitril/valsartan, ACEi, or ARB
gaps.name: HFrEF: RAASi not prescribed

gaps.detectionLogic: On ACEi/ARB not ARNI; SBP>=100, K+<5.0, eGFR>=20
gaps.name: HFrEF: ARNI switch opportunity
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, med list, SBP, K+, eGFR

gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF without MRA; K+<5.0, eGFR>=25
gaps.name: HFrEF: MRA not prescribed
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, med list, K+, eGFR

gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF without dapagliflozin or empagliflozin; eGFR>=20
gaps.name: HFrEF: SGLT2i not prescribed

gaps.detectionLogic: Worsening HFrEF (LVEF<45) with recent hospitalization on GDMT
gaps.name: HFrEF: Vericiguat candidate
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LVEF, HF hospitalization, GDMT

gaps.detectionLogic: Sacubitril/valsartan below 97/103 mg BID
gaps.name: HFrEF: ARNI not at target dose

gaps.detectionLogic: On MRA with K+>=5.5 or eGFR<20
gaps.name: HFrEF: MRA contraindicated by labs (SAFETY)
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, MRA active, K+, eGFR

gaps.detectionLogic: MRA active without K+ check in past 3 months
gaps.name: HFrEF: MRA K+ monitoring overdue

gaps.detectionLogic: Eligible by dx but eGFR<20 for initiation
gaps.name: HFrEF: SGLT2i eGFR contraindication noted

gaps.detectionLogic: Black race + HFrEF on ACEi/ARB without hydralazine+ISDN
gaps.name: HFrEF: Hydralazine/ISDN gap in self-identified Black

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF<=35, sinus rhythm, HR>=70 on max BB
gaps.name: HFrEF: Ivabradine candidate
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LVEF, rhythm, HR, BB dose

gaps.detectionLogic: Age>75 + eGFR<50 + digoxin>0.125 mg
gaps.name: HF: Digoxin inappropriate use (elderly + CKD + high dose)

gaps.detectionLogic: EF>=40% HF without SGLT2i (DELIVER/EMPEROR-Preserved)
gaps.name: HFpEF/HFmrEF: SGLT2i not prescribed

gaps.detectionLogic: EF>=40% HF without finerenone (FINEARTS-HF); K+<5.0, eGFR>=25
gaps.name: HFpEF/HFmrEF: Finerenone not prescribed
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LVEF, med list, K+, eGFR

gaps.detectionLogic: BMI>=30 + HFpEF without semaglutide/tirzepatide
gaps.name: Obese HFpEF: GLP-1 RA not prescribed
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LVEF, BMI, med list

gaps.detectionLogic: Age>=55 + HTN/DM/obesity + NT-proBNP elevated + E/e'>14 or LAVI>=34, no HF dx
gaps.name: Possible undiagnosed HFpEF
gaps.structuredDataElements: Risk dx, NT-proBNP, discrete echo E/e' + LAVI

gaps.detectionLogic: H2FPEF score>=6 without HF dx
gaps.name: H2FPEF score high probability without diagnosis
gaps.structuredDataElements: BMI, BP meds, AF, PASP, age, E/e'

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF<=35 + QRS>=150 + LBBB + NYHA II-IV on GDMT>=3mo
gaps.name: CRT Class I candidate not implanted
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LVEF, QRS duration, morphology, GDMT duration, device status

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF<=35 + post-MI>=40d on GDMT>=3mo, no ICD
gaps.name: ICD primary prevention - ischemic
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LVEF, MI history with date, GDMT, device status

gaps.detectionLogic: NICM + LVEF<=35 on GDMT>=3mo
gaps.name: ICD primary prevention - NICM (DANISH age-stratified)
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LVEF, ischemic etiology, GDMT, age, device

gaps.detectionLogic: Prior sustained VT/VF without ICD
gaps.name: ICD secondary prevention

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF<=35 + QRS 130-149 + LBBB on GDMT
gaps.name: CRT Class IIa candidate

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF<=35 + QRS>=150 + non-LBBB on GDMT
gaps.name: CRT Class IIb candidate

gaps.detectionLogic: NYHA III + HF hospitalization in past 12 months
gaps.name: CardioMEMS candidate
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, hospitalization, functional class proxy

gaps.detectionLogic: Prior CRT-D with ongoing HF hospitalizations, LV pacing <93%
gaps.name: CRT non-responder: LBBAP/HBP upgrade consideration
gaps.structuredDataElements: Device history, HF hospitalization, LV pacing % from interrogation

gaps.detectionLogic: Device implant date > battery life - 12 months
gaps.name: CIED battery ERI/EOL approaching
gaps.structuredDataElements: Device type + implant date + battery status

gaps.detectionLogic: Device infection, erosion, malfunction, or abandoned lead
gaps.name: Lead extraction indication
gaps.structuredDataElements: Device status, infection dx, complication codes

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF 25-45, NYHA III, narrow QRS, on GDMT - CCM eligible
gaps.name: Cardiac contractility modulation (CCM/Optimizer) candidate

gaps.detectionLogic: Recent MI + LVEF<=35 in waiting period for ICD eligibility
gaps.name: WCD (wearable cardioverter-defibrillator) bridge to decision
gaps.structuredDataElements: MI date, LVEF, ICD status, WCD order

gaps.detectionLogic: INTERMACS 1-4 signals or inotrope-dependent, no advanced HF referral
gaps.name: Advanced HF therapy evaluation (LVAD/transplant)
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, inotrope orders, hospitalization, referral

gaps.detectionLogic: HF hospitalization without discharge GDMT addition/uptitration
gaps.name: WHF event without GDMT intensification
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, hospitalization, pre/post med list

gaps.detectionLogic: Advanced HF trigger signal
gaps.name: Frequent flyer (>=2 HF hospitalizations in 12 months)

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + Na<125 or <130 symptomatic without tolvaptan considered
gaps.name: Tolvaptan candidate for severe hyponatremia in HF
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, Na value, tolvaptan med

gaps.detectionLogic: HF-cardiogenic shock without Impella/ECMO/VA-MCS escalation
gaps.name: SCAI stage C/D HF-CS: MCS escalation gap
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, shock dx, MCS procedures

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF decline >=10% between serial echos
gaps.name: Serial LVEF decline

gaps.detectionLogic: Multiple WHF + INTERMACS 5-7 without palliative consult
gaps.name: Palliative care not consulted in advanced HF
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, hospitalization pattern, palliative referral

gaps.detectionLogic: Escalating loop dose + persistent congestion without sequential nephron blockade
gaps.name: Diuretic resistance without step-up

gaps.detectionLogic: Prior MRA D/C for K+>=5.5 without patiromer/SZC
gaps.name: Hyperkalemia preventing MRA continuation - K+ binder gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Active inotrope order (milrinone, dobutamine)
gaps.name: Advanced HF: Inotrope dependence

gaps.detectionLogic: Rising Cr + LFTs + hyponatremia in HF
gaps.name: Advanced HF: End-organ dysfunction pattern

gaps.detectionLogic: Serial SBP<90 with GDMT dose reductions
gaps.name: Advanced HF: Low BP despite GDMT reduction

gaps.detectionLogic: Multiple GDMT discontinuations with labs/vitals
gaps.name: Advanced HF: GDMT intolerance pattern
gaps.structuredDataElements: Med D/C history, labs/vitals at D/C

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + ferritin<100 ng/mL without IV iron
gaps.name: Absolute iron deficiency untreated
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, ferritin, IV iron admin records

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + ferritin 100-299 + TSAT<20% without IV iron
gaps.name: Functional iron deficiency untreated
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, ferritin, TSAT, IV iron

gaps.detectionLogic: HF without ferritin or TSAT in past 12 months
gaps.name: Iron deficiency screening overdue

gaps.detectionLogic: Discharge med list missing BB, RAASi, MRA, or SGLT2i
gaps.name: HF discharge without all 4 GDMT pillars

gaps.detectionLogic: HF hospitalization discharge without HF clinic visit scheduled 7-14 days
gaps.name: No follow-up visit within 14 days of HF discharge
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, admit/discharge dates, post-discharge encounters

gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF stable post-discharge without cardiac rehab referral (CPT 93798)
gaps.name: Cardiac rehab not referred post-HF hospitalization

gaps.detectionLogic: HF admission (DRG 291-293) within 30d of prior HF discharge
gaps.name: 30-day readmission: HF DRG

gaps.detectionLogic: Short-stay HF encounter coded observation when inpatient criteria met
gaps.name: HF observation status misclassification
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, LOS, type of bill, observation vs inpatient code

gaps.detectionLogic: HF dx without PHQ-2/PHQ-9 in 12 months
gaps.name: Depression screening overdue (PHQ)

gaps.detectionLogic: HF without STOP-BANG or polysomnography
gaps.name: Sleep apnea not screened in HF

gaps.detectionLogic: HF without current flu, COVID, or pneumococcal vaccine
gaps.name: Vaccinations overdue in HF

gaps.detectionLogic: HF discharge to home without home health referral despite NYHA III-IV
gaps.name: Home health referral gap post-HF discharge
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, discharge disposition, HH referral

gaps.detectionLogic: HF discharge without teach-back documentation on weight, salt, meds
gaps.name: HF discharge education documentation

gaps.detectionLogic: >=3 of: age>=60, low-voltage ECG, NT-proBNP disproportionate to EF, bilateral carpal tunnel, spinal stenosis, conduction disease, AA race (V122I)
gaps.name: ATTR-CM screening: unexplained LVH + red flags
gaps.structuredDataElements: Wall thickness, ECG voltage, NT-proBNP, CPT 64721 bilateral CTR, M48.0x, conduction dx, race

gaps.detectionLogic: ATTR red flags + normal FLC without Tc-99m PYP
gaps.name: Amyloid workup: PYP scan not ordered

gaps.detectionLogic: E85.82 or E85.1 without tafamidis/vutrisiran/patisiran/acoramidis
gaps.name: ATTR-CM confirmed but no disease-modifying therapy

gaps.detectionLogic: ATTR red flags, kappa/lambda FLC never measured
gaps.name: Amyloid workup: FLC/immunofixation not ordered

gaps.detectionLogic: Suspected amyloid without complete plasma cell workup
gaps.name: AL amyloid workup gap (SPEP/UPEP/FLC)

gaps.detectionLogic: Amyloid dx without TTR genetic testing order
gaps.name: ATTR-CM: TTR gene sequencing gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Black race + HFpEF + age>=65 without ATTR workup
gaps.name: V122I screening in Black patients age>=65 with HFpEF
gaps.structuredDataElements: Race, age, HFpEF dx, amyloid workup

gaps.detectionLogic: I42.1 + LVOT gradient>=30 rest or >=50 provoked without mavacamten/aficamten
gaps.name: HCM with obstruction not on myosin inhibitor
gaps.structuredDataElements: HCM dx, LVOT gradient discrete, med list

gaps.detectionLogic: Proband HCM + FDR without screening echo + ECG
gaps.name: HCM first-degree relative cascade screening gap

gaps.detectionLogic: HCM persistent obstruction on max medical therapy
gaps.name: HCM: SRT (septal reduction) candidate
gaps.structuredDataElements: HCM dx, gradient, med list, SRT procedure history

gaps.detectionLogic: HCM without ICD risk assessment in 12 months
gaps.name: HCM: SCD risk stratification not documented
gaps.structuredDataElements: HCM dx, ICD status, risk factors (wall thickness, gradient, FHx SCD, syncope, NSVT)

gaps.detectionLogic: LVH pattern + apical thickening + giant T-wave inversion not diagnosed
gaps.name: Apical HCM missed diagnosis
gaps.structuredDataElements: Wall thickness by segment, ECG TWI

gaps.detectionLogic: Unexplained LVH + age<55 + CKD/neuropathy without alpha-gal A
gaps.name: Fabry disease screening
gaps.structuredDataElements: Wall thickness, age, CKD/neuropathy, alpha-gal A LOINC

gaps.detectionLogic: E75.21 without agalsidase or migalastat
gaps.name: Fabry confirmed: enzyme replacement gap

gaps.detectionLogic: New 2nd/3rd degree AV block age<60 without sarcoid workup
gaps.name: Cardiac sarcoidosis: unexplained AV block <60
gaps.structuredDataElements: Age, conduction dx, FDG-PET, sarcoid dx

gaps.detectionLogic: D86.85 without prednisone or steroid-sparing
gaps.name: Cardiac sarcoid confirmed: immunosuppression gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Endemic origin + RBBB+LAFB + CM without Chagas serology
gaps.name: Chagas CM screening
gaps.structuredDataElements: Country of origin, ECG morphology, CM dx, Chagas serology

gaps.detectionLogic: New LV dysfunction + HR>100 or PVC burden>=10% without rate/rhythm control
gaps.name: Tachycardia-mediated CM suspected
gaps.structuredDataElements: HR, PVC burden, LVEF, rate control meds

gaps.detectionLogic: Anthracycline order without baseline echo + GLS
gaps.name: Pre-anthracycline baseline cardiac assessment gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Serial LVEF drop >10% to <50% during therapy
gaps.name: Anthracycline-induced LVEF decline

gaps.detectionLogic: Trastuzumab active without echo in past 3 months
gaps.name: HER2 therapy cardiac surveillance gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Active ICI + new troponin or LVEF decline
gaps.name: ICI myocarditis screen during checkpoint inhibitor

gaps.detectionLogic: Female + LVEF<45 last month pregnancy through 5mo postpartum
gaps.name: Peripartum cardiomyopathy identification

gaps.detectionLogic: I42.8 LVNC + LVEF<40 without anticoagulation
gaps.name: LVNC anticoagulation gap

gaps.detectionLogic: I51.81 without follow-up echo in 3-4 weeks
gaps.name: Takotsubo recovery monitoring gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Prior chest radiation (Z92.3) + cardiac dx without annual echo
gaps.name: Radiation heart disease surveillance
gaps.structuredDataElements: Radiation history, echo dates, cardiac dx

gaps.detectionLogic: ARVC dx without ICD risk assessment
gaps.name: ARVC: ICD + exercise restriction counseling
gaps.structuredDataElements: ARVC dx pattern, RV imaging, ICD status

gaps.detectionLogic: LAMP2 mutation + massive LVH young male without transplant eval
gaps.name: Danon disease transplant evaluation
gaps.structuredDataElements: Genetic test, wall thickness, age, sex, transplant referral

gaps.detectionLogic: Acute HF + AKI without nephrology coordination
gaps.name: CRS type 1 (acute cardiorenal) untreated pattern
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx acute, eGFR decline, nephrology referral

gaps.detectionLogic: Chronic HF + eGFR slope > -3 mL/min/y
gaps.name: CRS type 2 (chronic cardiorenal): CKD progression rate
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, serial eGFR with dates

gaps.detectionLogic: eGFR<30 without HF screening (NT-proBNP or echo)
gaps.name: CRS type 4 (chronic renocardiac): HF screening in advanced CKD

gaps.detectionLogic: Diuretic-resistant congestion + rising Cr without UF evaluation
gaps.name: Cardiorenal: ultrafiltration consideration in diuretic-resistant HF

gaps.detectionLogic: Acute HF in setting of sepsis without early goal-directed therapy
gaps.name: CRS type 5 (systemic): sepsis or shock precipitant
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, sepsis dx, lactate, resuscitation bundle

gaps.detectionLogic: Effusion + tamponade features (RV collapse, IVC plethora) without drainage
gaps.name: Tamponade physiology on echo without drainage

gaps.detectionLogic: HFpEF + prior pericardial dx/radiation/cardiac surgery + discordance without constriction workup
gaps.name: Constrictive pericarditis consideration in HFpEF pattern
gaps.structuredDataElements: HFpEF, prior pericardial etiology, constriction imaging

gaps.detectionLogic: I31.x recurrent pericarditis without colchicine
gaps.name: Recurrent pericarditis: colchicine gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Steroid-dependent recurrent pericarditis without rilonacept
gaps.name: Recurrent pericarditis refractory: IL-1 inhibitor consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: Moderate-large effusion on echo without etiologic workup
gaps.name: Large pericardial effusion without workup

gaps.detectionLogic: LVAD (Z95.811) + INR not 2.0-3.0 at last check
gaps.name: Post-LVAD: anticoagulation INR out of range

gaps.detectionLogic: LVAD + recurrent GIB without angiodysplasia mgmt
gaps.name: Post-LVAD: GI bleeding without octreotide/ACEi mgmt

gaps.detectionLogic: LVAD + elevated LDH or heart failure signs without pump thrombosis workup
gaps.name: Post-LVAD: pump thrombosis screening

gaps.detectionLogic: LVAD + fever/local findings + blood culture without full workup
gaps.name: Post-LVAD: driveline infection suspicion

gaps.detectionLogic: Heart transplant (Z94.1) without annual/biannual CAV assessment
gaps.name: Post-transplant: CAV surveillance angiography gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Heart transplant without biopsy schedule adherence year 1
gaps.name: Post-transplant: rejection surveillance biopsy schedule

gaps.detectionLogic: Tacro/CsA/sirolimus without level within past 3 months
gaps.name: Post-transplant: immunosuppression level monitoring

gaps.detectionLogic: LVAD + rising CVP + low CO + RV dysfunction without RV MCS discussion
gaps.name: Post-LVAD: RV failure pattern without MCS reassessment

gaps.detectionLogic: Transplant first year without CMV PCR schedule
gaps.name: Post-transplant: CMV/EBV surveillance

gaps.detectionLogic: VA-ECMO without Impella/IABP unloading adjunct in LV distension
gaps.name: VA-ECMO: LV venting/unloading gap
gaps.structuredDataElements: ECMO procedure, Impella/IABP codes, LV dilation on echo

gaps.detectionLogic: VA-ECMO prolonged without weaning attempt or strategy
gaps.name: VA-ECMO: weaning protocol documentation

gaps.detectionLogic: Impella CP placed for AMI-CS without SCAI stage reassessment
gaps.name: Impella in LV recovery: escalation protocol adherence

gaps.detectionLogic: I42.0 DCM + FDR cardiomyopathy without cascade genetic testing
gaps.name: Familial DCM cascade screening gap
gaps.structuredDataElements: DCM dx, family hx, cascade referrals

gaps.detectionLogic: LMNA pathogenic + >=2 risk factors (NSVT, LVEF<45, male, non-missense)
gaps.name: LMNA cardiomyopathy: early ICD consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: FLNC mutation + cardiomyopathy without ICD risk stratification
gaps.name: Filamin C cardiomyopathy: ICD consideration
gaps.structuredDataElements: FLNC genotype, CM dx, ICD status

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF<50 + structural changes without GDMT initiation (stage B)
gaps.name: HF + asymptomatic LV dysfunction: Stage B progression risk

gaps.detectionLogic: Amyloid dx + AF without anticoagulation (all cardiac amyloid is high-risk)
gaps.name: Cardiac amyloidosis + AF: anticoagulation gap

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + permanent AF + HR>110 without rate control optimization
gaps.name: HF + chronic AF: rate vs rhythm review
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, AF dx, HR, rate meds

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + Hb<11 + iron deficiency without GI/hem workup
gaps.name: HF + iron deficiency + anemia without etiology workup
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, Hb, iron studies, GI referral

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + TSH abnormal without thyroid therapy documented
gaps.name: HF + thyroid dysfunction untreated

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + DM + HbA1c>8 without intensification
gaps.name: HF + diabetes: HbA1c target gap
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, DM, HbA1c, DM meds

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + CKD + metformin with eGFR<45 without dose review
gaps.name: HF + CKD + metformin: renal-dose review

gaps.detectionLogic: Unclear HF etiology without cardiac MRI for etiologic workup
gaps.name: HF + CHEF trial flag for primary CMR

gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF without any exercise capacity assessment
gaps.name: HF + functional assessment (6MWT or CPET) never done

gaps.detectionLogic: ICD with delivered therapies without appropriateness review
gaps.name: HF + ICD shocks: inappropriate vs appropriate review

gaps.detectionLogic: Pregnancy + HF + teratogenic med
gaps.name: HF in pregnancy: teratogenic med review (ACEi/ARB/ARNI/SGLT2i)
gaps.structuredDataElements: Pregnancy dx, HF dx, med list

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + chronic opioid without OSA screen or risk review
gaps.name: HF + opioid use: high-risk interaction / OSA exacerbation

gaps.detectionLogic: HF in cancer survivor on surveillance without cardio-onc f/u
gaps.name: HF + cancer survivorship: cardio-oncology referral gap
gaps.structuredDataElements: HF dx, cancer history, cardio-onc encounter

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + primary language Spanish without culturally tailored ed
gaps.name: HF + Hispanic/Latino: SDOH acculturation review

gaps.detectionLogic: HF + rural ADI high + no telehealth encounter in 12 months
